prs_reviewed.title: frontend: EditorDialog: Warn when resource modified during edit
charts: Use official Cluster Inventory secretreader images
backend: k8cache: Bypass non-API cluster paths
feat: Add configurable external links to sidebar via Helm values
frontend: Fix Backstage receiver listener leak on Home remount

skipped.reason: 179 non-draft new candidates all had human review activity (reviews or comments > 0)

style_guide: Commit subject format: `area: SubArea: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include auto-close keywords (Fixes/closes) in commit messages; PR body is acceptable.
Approval style is warm and brief: '🎉 thanks!' is the standard merge acknowledgment.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] auto-reviews all PRs — its presence does not indicate human review.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need.
Frontend (TypeScript/React): fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing with eslint-disable.
Backend (Go): use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first style.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic.
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker in kubernetes-sigs repos.
k8s-ci-robot posts IssueComment (not Review) on every PR — do not count as human review.
@illume reviews PRs very quickly; essentially all new PRs have human review by the time the daily job runs.
